mapping_description: SPAKEERU:Mapping to load data to MT_BUILD_ACTUAL_EXT

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TAB1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
TAB1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
TAB1.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
TAB1.REVENUE_FLAG,
TAB1.PRODUCT_KEY,
TAB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM (DV_BUILD_ACTUAL_USD_AMT) DV_BUILD_ACTUAL_USD_AMT,
TAB1.DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD,
TAB1.DV_TIER_CD,
current_timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
user EDW_CREATE_USER,
current_timestamp(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
user  EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
(
SELECT QTCBV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
QTCBV.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
QTCBV.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
QTCBV.REVENUE_FLAG,
QTCBV.PRODUCT_KEY,
QTCBV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(CASE WHEN QTCBV.DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD LIKE '%E-Delivery%' THEN QTCBV.SHIPPING_ACTUAL ELSE QTCBV.PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT END)  DV_BUILD_ACTUAL_USD_AMT,
QTCBV.DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD,
QTCBV.DV_TIER_CD
FROM
(
select NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
MMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, 
MMT.PRODUCT_KEY, 
RFDY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG  AS   REVENUE_FLAG
,SUM(CAST( ( (MMT.BUILD_AMT+ MMT.RTV_AMT) * NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))) AS PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT,
SUM(CAST(0 AS   DECIMAL(26,7))) AS SHIPPING_ACTUAL,
CASE WHEN SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  = 'Two Tier Distributor' THEN '2T' ELSE 'STD' END AS DV_TIER_CD,
CASE When NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID in ('APPSWIND', 'BASE', 'CONFIGSW', 'SWSUBSCRIP', 'FEATURE' ) 
        Then
            (CASE WHEN ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = 'MSJ' 
                THEN 'No-Delivery' 
                ELSE (Case When NSOLVT.delivery_option_cd LIKE  '%E-DELIV%' OR NSOLVT.delivery_option_cd = 'ELECTRONIC'
                            then 'E-Delivery'
                            Else 'Physical' 
                            End)
                End )
        Else
        'N/A'
End AS DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.MT_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDY  ON MMT.DV_SOURCE_CREATE_DT  = RFDY.CALENDAR_DATE   
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT NSCA ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN (select SALES_ORDER_KEY, BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV where END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') SO
ON (MMT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT  ON (SO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)  
  INNER JOIN ( select SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   where END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')NSOL 
  ON (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT ON (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE SCT 
ON NSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = SCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
AND SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND  SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG = 'Y' 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.ITEM_KEY =  MMT.PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  ORG1 ON ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=NSOL. BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE 
where  RFDY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  IN (0,1) AND
NSOLVT.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV') 
GROUP BY 1,2,3, 4,5,6,9,10

UNION ALL
 
SELECT
NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, 
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
RFWY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG  AS   REVENUE_FLAG,
SUM(CAST(0 AS   DECIMAL(26,7))) AS PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT, 
SUM(CAST(CAST(SOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE* (COALESCE(SOL.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0)) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *COALESCE(CAST(GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL (26,7)))  AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
AS SHIPPING_ACTUAL,
CASE WHEN SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  = 'Two Tier Distributor' THEN '2T' ELSE 'STD' END AS DV_TIER_CD,
CASE When  BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID in ('APPSWIND', 'BASE', 'CONFIGSW', 'SWSUBSCRIP', 'FEATURE' ) 
        Then
            (CASE WHEN PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = 'MSJ' 
                THEN 'No-Delivery' 
                ELSE (CASE WHEN NSOLVT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD LIKE  '%E-DELIV%' OR  NSOLVT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD = 'ELECTRONIC'
                            THEN 'E-Delivery'
                            ELSE 'Physical' 
                            END)
                END )
        ELSE
        'N/A'
        End AS DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL 
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS NP ON (SOL.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY )
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT NSCA ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  RFWY ON CAST(COALESCE(SOL.DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT ,SOL.SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE       )  AS DATE) = RFWY.CALENDAR_DATE
INNER JOIN (select SALES_ORDER_KEY, BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV where END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') SO ON (SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT  ON (SO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT ON NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG
ON  ( PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=SOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE  )
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
ON SO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND GL.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE ='Corporate'
AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= CAST(COALESCE(SOL.DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT ,SOL.SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE       ) AS DATE) 
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE SCT 
ON NSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = SCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
AND SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND  SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG = 'Y'
WHERE RFWY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  IN (0,1)
AND NSOLVT.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV')
AND NP.SERVICE_FLG      = 'N'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,9,10 
)
QTCBV
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,8,9
UNION ALL 
SELECT CG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
CG.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
CG.REVENUE_FLAG,
CG.PRODUCT_KEY,
CG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(CASE WHEN CG.DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD LIKE '%E-Delivery%' THEN CG.SHIPPING_ACTUAL ELSE CG.PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT END)  DV_BUILD_ACTUAL_USD_AMT,
CG.DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD,
CG.DV_TIER_CD
FROM
(
SELECT NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
MMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, 
MMT.PRODUCT_KEY, 
RFDY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
CASE WHEN SO.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG ='Y' THEN NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG 
ELSE NSOTT_LINE.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG  END   AS   REVENUE_FLAG  ,
SUM(CAST( ( (MMT.BUILD_AMT+ MMT.RTV_AMT) * NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))) AS PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT,
SUM(CAST(0 AS   DECIMAL(26,7))) AS SHIPPING_ACTUAL,
CASE WHEN SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  = 'Two Tier Distributor' THEN '2T' ELSE 'STD' END AS DV_TIER_CD,
CASE When NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID in ('APPSWIND', 'BASE', 'CONFIGSW', 'SWSUBSCRIP', 'FEATURE' ) 
        Then
            (CASE WHEN ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = 'MSJ' 
                THEN 'No-Delivery' 
                ELSE (Case When NSOLVT.delivery_option_cd LIKE  '%E-DELIV%' OR NSOLVT.delivery_option_cd = 'ELECTRONIC'
                            then 'E-Delivery'
                            Else 'Physical' 
                            End)
                End )
        Else
        'N/A'
        End as DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD
  FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.MT_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MMT
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDY  ON MMT.DV_SOURCE_CREATE_DT  = RFDY.CALENDAR_DATE   
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT NSCA ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN (select SALES_ORDER_KEY, BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV where END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') SO
  ON (MMT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT  ON (SO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)  
  INNER JOIN ( select SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   where  END_TV_DATETIME   = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')NSOL 
  ON (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT ON (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT_LINE ON (NSOTT_LINE.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOLVT.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME) 
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE SCT 
ON NSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = SCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
AND SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
/*AND  SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG = 'Y' */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.ITEM_KEY =  MMT.PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  ORG1 ON ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE 
where  RFDY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  IN (0,1) AND 
 NSOLVT.SS_CODE ='CG'
 group by 1,2,3, 4,5,6,9,10

UNION ALL

SELECT
NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, 
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
RFWY.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
CASE WHEN SO.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG ='Y' THEN NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG 
ELSE NSOTT_LINE.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG  END   AS   REVENUE_FLAG,
SUM(CAST(0 AS   DECIMAL(26,7))) AS PHYSICAL_DELIVERY_AMOUNT, 
SUM(CAST(CAST(SOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE* (COALESCE(SOL.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0)) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *COALESCE(CAST(GL.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL (26,7)))  AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
AS SHIPPING_ACTUAL,
CASE WHEN SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  = 'Two Tier Distributor' THEN '2T' ELSE 'STD' END AS DV_TIER_CD,
CASE When  BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID in ('APPSWIND', 'BASE', 'CONFIGSW', 'SWSUBSCRIP', 'FEATURE' ) 
        Then
            (CASE WHEN PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = 'MSJ' 
                THEN 'No-Delivery' 
                ELSE (CASE WHEN NSOLVT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD LIKE  '%E-DELIV%' OR  NSOLVT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD = 'ELECTRONIC'
                            THEN 'E-Delivery'
                            ELSE 'Physical' 
                            END)
                END )
        ELSE
        'N/A'
        End as DV_DELIVERY_TYPE_CD
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL 
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS NP ON (SOL.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY )
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT NSCA ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  RFWY ON CAST(COALESCE(SOL.DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT ,SOL.SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE       )  AS DATE) = RFWY.CALENDAR_DATE
INNER JOIN (select SALES_ORDER_KEY, BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV where END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') SO ON (SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT  ON (SO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT ON NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOTT_LINE ON (NSOTT_LINE.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOLVT.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG
ON  ( PV_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=SOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE  )
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE GL
ON SO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = GL.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND GL.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE ='Corporate'
AND GL.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND GL.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= CAST(COALESCE(SOL.DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT ,SOL.SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE       ) AS DATE) 
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE SCT 
ON NSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = SCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
AND SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
/*AND  SCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG = 'Y' */
WHERE RFWY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  IN (0,1)
AND NSOLVT.SS_CODE IN ('CG')
AND NP.SERVICE_FLG      = 'N'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,9,10 
) CG
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,8,9
) TAB1 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,8,9
